title: AI in Music: Creative Tool or Creative Threat?
subtitle: 人工智能与音乐创作之争

paragraphs.en: Since American Idol star Taryn Southern started composing music with AI in 2017, musicians all over the world have begun wondering about the implications of AI and modern technology where music production is concerned. Using AI in the creation of music is perceived by some as a helpful tool and by others as almost 'the beginning of the end'. In Taryn's case, AI software enabled her to communicate melodies and chords that she didn't know how to put together herself.
paragraphs.zh: 自2017年《美国偶像》明星塔琳·萨瑟恩开始用人工智能创作音乐以来，世界各地的音乐人纷纷开始思考人工智能和现代技术对音乐制作的影响。在音乐创作中使用人工智能，一些人视其为有益工具，另一些人则几乎视其为“终结的开始”。在塔琳的例子中，人工智能软件使她能够表达出自己不知如何组合的旋律与和弦。

paragraphs.en: The end product was therefore a collaborative effort, rather than a piece entirely produced by technology. Taryn's story has a distinctly positive feel that highlights the advantages of using AI in music production. It can serve as a source of inspiration, and as an ideal jumping-off point should a musician be hit with writer's block. Contrary to seeing AI as a tool, some musicians consider it to be hugely detrimental to the music scene.
paragraphs.zh: 因此最终成品是一种协作的成果，而非完全由技术生成的作品。塔琳的故事带有明显的积极色彩，凸显了在音乐制作中使用人工智能的优势。它可以作为灵感来源，并且在音乐人遭遇创作瓶颈时成为理想的出发点。与视人工智能为工具相反，一些音乐人认为它对音乐界极为有害。

paragraphs.en: At the moment, because such technology is still so young, the music it's producing is not necessarily what we want to hear. In short, it's not of great quality. Those who have produced their own music, or even fans of authentic, artistic music, will also argue that a computer could never emulate the work (and human touch) of a true musician. Music has been an integral part of the story of humans for ages; in fact, the first known piece of music is believed to be around 3,400 years old.
paragraphs.zh: 目前，由于这类技术尚处于早期阶段，它生成的音乐未必是我们想听的。简而言之，质量不高。那些自己制作过音乐的人，甚至是真正艺术音乐的爱好者，也会辩称计算机永远无法模仿真正音乐家的作品（以及其中的人文温度）。长久以来，音乐一直是人类故事中不可或缺的一部分；事实上，已知的第一首音乐作品被认为已有约3400年历史。

words.meaning: adj. 不可或缺的，完整的

paragraphs.en: Songs have long been used as a means of communicating messages and folk stories, covering everything from societal ethics to world history. Since many people see music as such an inherently human expression, it is often considered as too precious to impart to technology. The thought of a computer generating a 'random' piece of music that hasn't been painstakingly created by an artist is almost seen as sacrilegious. Regardless of which side of the argument you fall on, it seems likely that the use of AI in music production will only become more frequent.
paragraphs.zh: 歌曲长期以来被用作传达信息和民间故事的手段，涵盖从社会伦理到世界历史的方方面面。由于许多人视音乐为一种固有的人类表达，它常被认为太过珍贵而不应托付给技术。一想到计算机生成一段未经艺术家精心创作的“随机”音乐，几乎被视为亵渎。无论你站在争论的哪一边，人工智能在音乐制作中的使用似乎只会越来越频繁。

paragraphs.en: Our modern world is preoccupied with technological advancements. Instead of shying away from the idea of this bleak future, the best approach to take is one of optimism and curiosity. While there are always bound to be stubborn old-school musicians who refuse to use tech, music producers should consider AI as something to be embraced. AI music software is still very much in its infancy, but with more investors interested in the development and outcomes of such technology, and considering the rapid growth rate of other tech advances in recent years, it's only a matter of time before AI-produced music is seen as the new norm.
paragraphs.zh: 我们的现代世界痴迷于技术进步。与其回避这个黯淡未来的想法，最好的态度是保持乐观与好奇。虽然总会有顽固的老派音乐人拒绝使用技术，音乐制作人应将人工智能视为值得拥抱的事物。人工智能音乐软件仍处于起步阶段，但随着更多投资者对此类技术的发展和成果产生兴趣，加之近年来其他技术进步的快速增长，人工智能制作的音乐被视为新常态只是时间问题。

words.meaning: adj. 全神贯注的，痴迷的
